//: Single source of truth for the pinned versions of the bundled external Pulumi language runtimes. Renovate updates this file and `make renovate` writes a changelog entry per bump. For each runtime, `repo` is the GitHub owner/repo (also the renovate depName) and `version` is the release tag. Consumed by scripts/get-language-providers.sh. (The unbundled HCL runtime is pinned separately in pkg/util/plugin.go.)
